- crash.release(handle: number)
- crash.set_user_field(index: number, value: string)
- crash.get_modules(handle: number): Record<string | number, unknown>
- crash.get_user_field(handle: number, index: number): string
- crash.get_sys_field(handle: number, index: number): string | nil
- crash.get_signum(handle: number): number
- crash.get_backtrace(handle: number): Record<string | number, unknown>
- crash.get_extra_data(handle: number): string

- crash.SYSFIELD_ENGINE_HASH
- crash.SYSFIELD_DEVICE_MODEL
- crash.SYSFIELD_MANUFACTURER
- crash.SYSFIELD_SYSTEM_NAME
- crash.SYSFIELD_SYSTEM_VERSION

- crash.SYSFIELD_DEVICE_LANGUAGE

- crash.SYSFIELD_MAX

- crash.USERFIELD_SIZE

- factory.get_status(url?: string | Hash | Url): Opaque<"constant">

### font

### go

- go.get(url: string | Hash | Url, property: string | Hash, options?: Record<string | number, unknown>): number | boolean | Hash | Url | Vector3 | Vector4 | Quaternion | Opaque<"resource">
- go.set(url: string | Hash | Url, property: string | Hash, value: number | boolean | Hash | Url | Vector3 | Vector4 | Quaternion | Opaque<"resource">, options?: Record<string | number, unknown>)
- go.get_position(id?: string | Hash | Url): Vector3
- go.get_rotation(id?: string | Hash | Url): Quaternion
- go.get_scale(id?: string | Hash | Url): Vector3
- go.get_scale_uniform(id?: string | Hash | Url): number
- go.set_position(position: Vector3, id?: string | Hash | Url)
- go.set_rotation(rotation: Quaternion, id?: string | Hash | Url)
- go.set_scale(scale: number | Vector3, id?: string | Hash | Url)
- go.set_scale_xy(scale: number | Vector3, id?: string | Hash | Url)
- go.set_parent(id?: string | Hash | Url, parent_id?: string | Hash | Url, keep_world_transform?: boolean)
- go.get_parent(id?: string | Hash | Url): Hash | nil
- go.get_world_position(id?: string | Hash | Url): Vector3
- go.get_world_rotation(id?: string | Hash | Url): Quaternion
- go.get_world_scale(id?: string | Hash | Url): Vector3
- go.get_world_scale_uniform(id?: string | Hash | Url): number
- go.get_world_transform(id?: string | Hash | Url): Matrix4
- go.update_world_transform(id?: string | Hash | Url)
- go.get_id(path?: string): Hash
- go.animate(url: string | Hash | Url, property: string | Hash, playback: go.PLAYBACK_ONCE_FORWARD | go.PLAYBACK_ONCE_BACKWARD | go.PLAYBACK_ONCE_PINGPONG | go.PLAYBACK_LOOP_FORWARD | go.PLAYBACK_LOOP_BACKWARD | go.PLAYBACK_LOOP_PINGPONG, to: number | Vector3 | Vector4 | Quaternion, easing: Vector | go.EASING_INBACK | go.EASING_INBOUNCE | go.EASING_INCIRC | go.EASING_INCUBIC | go.EASING_INELASTIC | go.EASING_INEXPO | go.EASING_INOUTBACK | go.EASING_INOUTBOUNCE | go.EASING_INOUTCIRC | go.EASING_INOUTCUBIC | go.EASING_INOUTELASTIC | go.EASING_INOUTEXPO | go.EASING_INOUTQUAD | go.EASING_INOUTQUART | go.EASING_INOUTQUINT | go.EASING_INOUTSINE | go.EASING_INQUAD | go.EASING_INQUART | go.EASING_INQUINT | go.EASING_INSINE | go.EASING_LINEAR | go.EASING_OUTBACK | go.EASING_OUTBOUNCE | go.EASING_OUTCIRC | go.EASING_OUTCUBIC | go.EASING_OUTELASTIC | go.EASING_OUTEXPO | go.EASING_OUTINBACK | go.EASING_OUTINBOUNCE | go.EASING_OUTINCIRC | go.EASING_OUTINCUBIC | go.EASING_OUTINELASTIC | go.EASING_OUTINEXPO | go.EASING_OUTINQUAD | go.EASING_OUTINQUART | go.EASING_OUTINQUINT | go.EASING_OUTINSINE | go.EASING_OUTQUAD | go.EASING_OUTQUART | go.EASING_OUTQUINT | go.EASING_OUTSINE, duration: number, delay?: number, complete_function?: function(self, url, property))
- go.cancel_animations(url: string | Hash | Url, property?: string | Hash)
- go.delete(id?: string | Hash | Url | Record<string | number, unknown>, recursive?: boolean)
- go.property(name: string, value: number | Hash | Url | Vector3 | Vector4 | Quaternion | Opaque<"resource"> | boolean)
- go.exists(url: string | Hash | Url): boolean
- go.world_to_local_position(position: Vector3, url: string | Hash | Url): Vector3
- go.world_to_local_transform(transformation: Matrix4, url: string | Hash | Url): Matrix4
- init(self: Opaque<"userdata">)
- final(self: Opaque<"userdata">)
- update(self: Opaque<"userdata">, dt: number)
- fixed_update(self: Opaque<"userdata">, dt: number)
- late_update(self: Opaque<"userdata">, dt: number)
- on_message(self: Opaque<"userdata">, message_id: Hash, message: Record<string | number, unknown>, sender: Url)
- on_input(self: Opaque<"userdata">, action_id: Hash, action: Record<string | number, unknown>): boolean | nil
- on_reload(self: Opaque<"userdata">)
- go.PLAYBACK_NONE
- go.PLAYBACK_ONCE_FORWARD
- go.PLAYBACK_ONCE_BACKWARD
- go.PLAYBACK_ONCE_PINGPONG
- go.PLAYBACK_LOOP_FORWARD
- go.PLAYBACK_LOOP_BACKWARD
- go.PLAYBACK_LOOP_PINGPONG
- go.EASING_LINEAR
- go.EASING_INQUAD
- go.EASING_OUTQUAD
- go.EASING_INOUTQUAD
- go.EASING_OUTINQUAD
- go.EASING_INCUBIC
- go.EASING_OUTCUBIC
- go.EASING_INOUTCUBIC
- go.EASING_OUTINCUBIC
- go.EASING_INQUART
- go.EASING_OUTQUART
- go.EASING_INOUTQUART
- go.EASING_OUTINQUART
- go.EASING_INQUINT
- go.EASING_OUTQUINT
- go.EASING_INOUTQUINT
- go.EASING_OUTINQUINT
- go.EASING_INSINE
- go.EASING_OUTSINE
- go.EASING_INOUTSINE
- go.EASING_OUTINSINE
- go.EASING_INEXPO
- go.EASING_OUTEXPO
- go.EASING_INOUTEXPO
- go.EASING_OUTINEXPO
- go.EASING_INCIRC
- go.EASING_OUTCIRC
- go.EASING_INOUTCIRC
- go.EASING_OUTINCIRC
- go.EASING_INELASTIC
- go.EASING_OUTELASTIC
- go.EASING_INOUTELASTIC
- go.EASING_OUTINELASTIC

- loadfile(filename?: string): LuaMultiReturn<[() => any] | [undefined, string]>
- loadstring(chunk: string | (() => string | null | undefined), chunkname?: string, mode?: "b" | "t" | "bt", env?: object): LuaMultiReturn<[() => any] | [undefined, string]>
- next(table: object, index?: any): LuaMultiReturn<[any, any] | []>
- pairs<T>(t: T): LuaIterable<LuaMultiReturn<[keyof T, NonNullable<T[keyof T]>]>>
- pcall<A extends any[], R>(f: (...args: A) => R, ...args: A): LuaMultiReturn<[true, R] | [false, string]>
- print(...args: any[]): void
- rawequal<T>(v1: T, v2: T): boolean
- rawget<T extends object, K extends keyof T>(table: T, index: K): T[K]
- rawset<T extends object, K extends keyof T>(table: T, index: K, value: T[K]): T
- select<T>(index: number, ...args: T[]): LuaMultiReturn<T[]>
- select<T>(index: "#", ...args: T[]): number
- setfenv<T extends Function>(f: T, table: object): T
- setmetatable<T extends object>(table: T, metatable?: LuaMetatable<T> | null): T
- tonumber(e: any, base?: number): number | undefined
- tostring(v: any): string
- type(v: any): "nil" | "number" | "string" | "boolean" | "table" | "function" | "thread" | "userdata"
- unpack<T extends any[]>(list: T): LuaMultiReturn<T>
- unpack<T>(list: T[], i: number, j?: number): LuaMultiReturn<T[]>
- xpcall<R, E>(f: () => R, err: (err: any) => E): LuaMultiReturn<[true, R] | [false, E]>
- module(name: string, ...options: any[]): void
- require(modname: string): any
- _G: unknown
- _VERSION: unknown

### bit

- bit.tobit(x: number): number
- bit.tohex(x: number, n?: number): string
- bit.bnot(x: number): number
- bit.bor(x: number, ...rest: number[]): number
- bit.band(x: number, ...rest: number[]): number
- bit.bxor(x: number, ...rest: number[]): number
- bit.lshift(x: number, n: number): number
- bit.rshift(x: number, n: number): number
- bit.arshift(x: number, n: number): number
- bit.rol(x: number, n: number): number
- bit.ror(x: number, n: number): number
- bit.bswap(x: number): number

### coroutine

- coroutine.create(f: (...args: any[]) => any): LuaThread
- coroutine.resume(co: LuaThread, ...val: any[]): LuaMultiReturn<[true, ...any[]] | [false, string]>
- coroutine.running(): LuaThread | undefined
- coroutine.status(co: LuaThread): "running" | "suspended" | "normal" | "dead"
- coroutine.wrap(f: (...args: any[]) => any): (...args: any[]) => LuaMultiReturn<any[]>
- coroutine.yield(...args: any[]): LuaMultiReturn<any[]>

### debug

- debug.debug(): void
- debug.getfenv(o: object): any
- debug.gethook(thread?: LuaThread): LuaMultiReturn<[undefined, 0] | [Function, number, string?]>
- debug.getinfo(f: Function | number, what?: string): FunctionInfo
- debug.getlocal(level: number, local: number): LuaMultiReturn<[string, any]>
- debug.getmetatable<T>(value: T): LuaMetatable<T> | undefined
- debug.getregistry(): Record<string, any>
- debug.getupvalue(f: Function, up: number): LuaMultiReturn<[string, any] | []>
- debug.setfenv<T extends object>(o: T, table: object): T
- debug.sethook(hook?: (event: "call" | "return" | "line" | "count", line?: number) => any, mask?: string, count?: number): void
- debug.setlocal(level: number, local: number, value: any): string | undefined
- debug.setmetatable<T extends object>(value: T, table?: LuaMetatable<T> | null): T
- debug.setupvalue(f: Function, up: number, value: any): string | undefined
- debug.traceback(message?: string, level?: number): string

### io

- io.close(file?: LuaFile): boolean
- io.flush(): boolean
- io.input(file?: string | LuaFile): LuaFile
- io.lines(filename?: string, ...formats: ("*n" | "*l" | "*a" | number)[]): LuaIterable<string | number>
- io.open(filename: string, mode?: string): LuaFile | undefined
- io.output(file?: string | LuaFile): LuaFile
- io.popen(prog: string, mode?: "r" | "w"): LuaFile | undefined
- io.read(): string | undefined
- io.read(format: "*n" | "*l" | "*a" | number): string | number | undefined
- io.read(...formats: ("*n" | "*l" | "*a" | number)[]): (string | number | undefined)[]
- io.tmpfile(): LuaFile
- io.type(obj: unknown): "file" | "closed file" | undefined
- io.write(...args: (string | number)[]): LuaFile | undefined
- file:close(): boolean
- file:flush(): boolean
- file:lines(): LuaIterable<string>
- file:lines(...formats: ("*n" | "*l" | "*a" | number)[]): LuaIterable<string | number>
- file:read(): string | undefined
- file:read(format: "*n" | "*l" | "*a" | number): string | number | undefined
- file:read(...formats: ("*n" | "*l" | "*a" | number)[]): (string | number | undefined)[]
- file:seek(whence?: "set" | "cur" | "end", offset?: number): number | undefined
- file:setvbuf(mode: "no" | "full" | "line", size?: number): void
- file:write(...args: (string | number)[]): LuaFile | undefined

### math

- math.abs(x: number): number
- math.acos(x: number): number
- math.asin(x: number): number
- math.atan(x: number): number
- math.atan2(y: number, x: number): number
- math.ceil(x: number): number
- math.cos(x: number): number
- math.cosh(x: number): number
- math.deg(x: number): number
- math.exp(x: number): number
- math.floor(x: number): number
- math.fmod(x: number, y: number): number
- math.frexp(x: number): LuaMultiReturn<[number, number]>
- math.ldexp(m: number, e: number): number
- math.log(x: number): number
- math.log10(x: number): number
- math.max(x: number, ...numbers: number[]): number
- math.min(x: number, ...numbers: number[]): number
- math.modf(x: number): LuaMultiReturn<[number, number]>
- math.pow(x: number, y: number): number
- math.rad(x: number): number
- math.random(m?: number, n?: number): number
- math.randomseed(x: number): number
- math.sin(x: number): number
- math.sinh(x: number): number
- math.sqrt(x: number): number
- math.tan(x: number): number
- math.tanh(x: number): number
- math.huge: unknown
- math.pi: unknown

### os

- os.clock(): number
- os.date(format?: string, time?: number): string
- os.date(format: "*t", time?: number): LuaDateInfoResult
- os.difftime(t1: number, t2: number): number
- os.execute(command?: string): number
- os.exit(code?: number): never
- os.getenv(varname: string): string | undefined
- os.remove(filename: string): LuaMultiReturn<[true] | [undefined, string]>
- os.rename(oldname: string, newname: string): LuaMultiReturn<[true] | [undefined, string]>
- os.setlocale(locale?: string, category?: "all" | "collate" | "ctype" | "monetary" | "numeric" | "time"): string | undefined
- os.time(): number
- os.time(table: LuaDateInfo): number
- os.tmpname(): string

### package

- package.cpath: string
- package.loaded: Record<string, any>
- package.loaders: (((modname: string) => LuaMultiReturn<[(modname: string) => void]>) | (<T>(modname: string) => LuaMultiReturn<[(modname: string, extra: T) => T, T]>) | string)[]
- package.loadlib(libname: string, funcname: string): [Function] | [undefined, string, "open" | "init"]
- package.path: string
- package.preload: Record<string, (modname: string, fileName?: string) => any>
- package.seeall(module: object): void

### string

- string.byte(s: string, i?: number): number
- string.byte(s: string, i?: number, j?: number): LuaMultiReturn<number[]>
- string.char(...args: number[]): string
- string.dump(func: Function): string
- string.find(s: string, pattern: string, init?: number, plain?: boolean): LuaMultiReturn<[number, number, ...string[]] | []>
- string.format(formatstring: string, ...args: any[]): string
- string.gmatch(s: string, pattern: string): LuaIterable<LuaMultiReturn<string[]>>
- string.gsub(s: string, pattern: string, repl: string | Record<string, string> | ((...matches: string[]) => string), n?: number): LuaMultiReturn<[string, number]>
- string.len(s: string): number
- string.lower(s: string): string
- string.match(s: string, pattern: string, init?: number): LuaMultiReturn<string[]>
- string.rep(s: string, n: number): string
- string.reverse(s: string): string
- string.sub(s: string, i: number, j?: number): string
- string.upper(s: string): string

### table

- table.concat(list: (string | number)[], sep?: string, i?: number, j?: number): string
- table.insert<T>(list: T[], value: T): void
- table.insert<T>(list: T[], pos: number, value: T): void
- table.maxn(table: object): number
- table.remove<T>(list: T[], pos?: number): T | undefined
- table.sort<T>(list: T[], comp?: (a: T, b: T) => boolean): void
